Title: Extends provisions related to certified school psychologists and special education services and programs for preschool children with handicapping conditions
Summary: Extends provisions related to certified school psychologists and special education services and programs for preschool children with handicapping conditions until June 30, 2028.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 217 of the laws of 2015, amending the education law relating to certified school psychologists and special education services and programs for preschool children with handicapping conditions, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
